name: refinery-html-to-llm-cleaner
title: HTML to Text Cleaner - Ultra-Fast HTML Extraction
description: Extract clean text from HTML in 2-8ms. Removes JavaScript, CSS, and tracking tags automatically. Reduces LLM token costs by 40%. Perfect for RAG pipelines, web scrapers, and AI agents that need reliable data preprocessing.
seoTitle: Fast HTML Text Extraction API - Web Scraping Tool
seoDescription: Ultra-fast HTML text extraction at $0.002 per page. 281x faster than BeautifulSoup. Perfect for web scraping, data mining, and text processing. Strip JavaScript and CSS instantly.
